assertions.title: Shift+Click range select in list views
assertions.reason: HierarchyView selected an inclusive range (employees 1-4) after click + Shift+click; bulk delete confirmation showed count 4.

steps.action: Open HierarchyView, click first employee, hold Shift, click fourth employee.
steps.observed: Bulk action toolbar appeared and Delete Selected confirmation showed 'Delete 4 Employees'.

evidence.network: No mutation API calls required for this UI-only selection check.

assertions.title: Lasso/marquee select in OrgChartView
assertions.reason: Shift+drag marquee attempts on canvas did not produce selected state or bulk action controls.

steps.action: In OrgChartView, perform Shift+drag marquee over multiple employee cards.
steps.observed: No selected-state/bulk-action UI appeared after repeated marquee attempts.

steps.action: Control check with Cmd+click on two cards.
steps.observed: Bulk actions appeared on Cmd+click, indicating issue is specific to lasso/marquee gesture.

evidence.network: No mutation API calls required for this UI-only selection check.

assertions.issues: Marquee/lasso interaction did not trigger selection even with Shift modifier.

assertions.title: Request changes returns to submitter
assertions.reason: Approver could set Changes Requested, but submitter UI only exposed View; Edit & Resubmit controls were not present.

steps.action: As VP approver, request changes on request 69e30319867b0c7f4dffe77e with comment.
steps.expected: Request status changes to Changes Requested.
steps.observed: Changes Requested count increased and request status persisted as changes_requested.

steps.action: As manager submitter, open Changes Requested tab and request detail.
steps.expected: Submitter can edit and resubmit; chain restarts from step 1.
steps.observed: Row was view-only and detail modal had no resubmit controls.

assertions.issues: Submitter resubmit/edit path is missing from observed UI state.

assertions.title: Notifications for approval events
assertions.reason: Event entries were visible in notification dropdown and next-approver queue badges updated, but submitter bell badge count did not render/update.

steps.action: Advance approval request 69e3031a867b0c7f4dffe78a through VP -> Finance -> CHRO; reject request 69e3031a867b0c7f4dffe784; request changes on 69e30319867b0c7f4dffe77e.
steps.expected: Next approver receives notification on advancement and submitter receives approval/rejection/changes notifications with real-time badge updates.
steps.observed: Finance and CHRO received pending items (Approvals nav badge), and manager notification dropdown listed approved/rejected/request_changes events; however submitter bell badge element was absent after events.

evidence.network: Audit verification via GET /api/headcount-requests/{id}: approve request progressed with 3 approve actions and final status approved; reject request status rejected; changes request status changes_requested (see misc-1/multi-approval/network-summary.json).

assertions.issues: Submitter notification bell badge did not appear/update despite event history existing in dropdown.

assertions.title: Self-approval prevention
assertions.reason: Own pending request rendered as View-only row instead of disabled Approve button with tooltip text.

steps.action: As VP submitter, view own pending request 69e3031a867b0c7f4dffe790 in Approvals.
steps.expected: Disabled Approve button is shown with tooltip 'You cannot approve your own request.'
steps.observed: Request appeared with disabled checkbox and View action only; no disabled Approve control/tooltip rendered.

evidence.network: GET /api/headcount-requests/69e3031a867b0c7f4dffe790 -> status=pending, requestedBy=VP user id (see network-summary.json).

assertions.issues: Required self-approval disabled-approve tooltip UX not present.

frictions.description: OrgChart marquee selection requires Shift+drag; despite repeated coordinate drag attempts, marquee did not select nodes in this run.
frictions.resolution: Used Cmd+click as a control path to confirm multi-select plumbing still works while recording lasso failure evidence.

frictions.description: Action buttons in Approvals rows are icon-only and require careful row/action mapping during automation.
frictions.resolution: Verified each action by resulting modal CTA label (Approve Request / Reject Request / Request Changes) before submitting.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-MULTI-002) and 4 failed (VAL-MULTI-003, VAL-APPROVAL-009, VAL-APPROVAL-010, VAL-APPROVAL-013).
